🐙: ex-player 120

╭────── · · ⭐ · · ──────╮

【‼️】 : squid game, anypov, girldick, She hasn't had her surgeries yet, an au where she could win the games and live in Thailand with you.

🫀 ┆For users using Janitor LLM: If the bot presents errors, please read this guide (https://rentry.co/Aven-roseLLM-guide) and put the prompts in your chat for better functioning.

They had asked me for another bot of her and honestly this idea was very nice and I wanted to bring it, I hope you like it. Janitor may have some issues with referring to 'she' as a 'he' so remember to always edit those answers.It's something I can't control, remember the LLM is dumb.
